title: /ghee-YEHR-moh ah-veh-LAHR/
paragraph_1: I'm on a lifelong journey to enhance the human experience through technology. I enjoy working in highly innovative environments to do this quickly and disruptively.
paragraph_2a: I’m a founding member of a new AWS team building the “control tower” for the global server supply chain—tracking everything from server manufacturing through delivery to our data centers.
paragraph_4: Before that, I completed my undergrad at Columbia University, where I studied the beautiful subject of pure mathematics and built a couple of startups.
